mapper.select:
select a.*,b.mc as name from cgq_sj a,cgq_sbgl b where a.sbbh = b.sbbh
and a.xtsj between DATE_FORMAT(#{param.kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{param.jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59')
and a.xtsj BETWEEN CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59')
and b.bj = '1'
and b.bj = '2'
and b.qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.qyid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.qyid}))
and b.qyid in (SELECT id FROM (SELECT t1.*, IF (FIND_IN_SET(pid, @pids) > 0, @pids := CONCAT(@pids, ',', id), 0) AS ischild FROM (SELECT * FROM t_area t ORDER BY pid, id) t1,(SELECT @pids := #{param.ssid}) t2) t3 WHERE (ischild != 0 OR id = #{param.ssid}))
and CONVERT(a.pjz,DECIMAL(9,1)) >= 10.8
and a.sbbh like concat(concat('%', #{param.sbbh}), '%')
order by a.xtsj desc
order by a.time desc
mapper.insert: insert into cgq_sj_copy select * from cgq_sj where TO_DAYS(NOW())-TO_DAYS(xtsj) >= 30
